summary: Tested Admin Assets Library integration and 'Get The Playbook' button. All features working correctly - backend APIs 100% (12/12 tests), frontend UI fully functional.
seed_data_creation: test_upload.txt with tags [test, backend-test, test-integration] exists in assets library from development
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 10 features verified. Assets auto-cataloguing from upload routes working with source/tags. Admin Assets Library UI has filters, search, upload panel, and preview modal with visibility controls.

details: ASSETS tab visible in admin nav between 'THE DEN' and 'ACTIVITY'
Asset Library displays all uploaded assets with thumbnails for images
Filter buttons: All, Images (3), PDFs (1), Scripts, Decks, eBooks, Other (1)
Search input functional
Upload Asset button opens upload panel with: Asset Type, Visibility, Tags fields
File upload zone with drag & drop support
Visibility badges (ADMIN shown) on all asset cards
Asset preview modal with Copy URL, visibility selector, Download button
POST /api/upload/image with auto_library=true creates asset in library
Source and tags are correctly stored in asset metadata
Asset ID returned in upload response
Asset visible in library with correct type=image
POST /api/upload/file with auto_library=true creates asset in library
PDF files correctly detected as asset_type=pdf
Source tag auto-added to tags list
test_upload.txt visible with tags [test, backend-test, test-integration]
Button with data-testid='get-the-playbook-btn' exists on Blog page
Click dispatches 'trigger-lead-magnet' custom event
LeadMagnetPopup appears with Producer's Playbook mockup image
Popup contains email input, 'GET THE PLAYBOOK' submit button
Close button (X) dismisses popup
Filter by type: Images shows 3 assets
Filter by type: PDFs shows 1 asset (Producer's Playbook)
Filter by type: Other shows 1 asset (test_upload.txt)
Filter counts displayed next to filter labels
All assets show 'ADMIN' badge (default visibility)
Visibility can be changed via preview modal dropdown
Three visibility options: Admin, Public, Investor

assets_crud.GET /api/assets: PASSED - Lists assets with optional filters

upload_auto_catalogue.POST /api/upload/image (auto_library=tru: PASSED - Auto-adds to assets library with tags
upload_auto_catalogue.POST /api/upload/file (auto_library=true: PASSED - Auto-adds file to assets library
